an4.144:1.1: “There are these four types of brightness.
an4.144:1.3: The brightness of the sun, the brightness of the moon, the brightness of fire, and the brightness of discernment.
an4.144:1.4: These are the four types of brightness.
an4.144:1.5: And of these four types of brightness, the foremost is the brightness of discernment.”
